posts.author: hannahlucid (Hannah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

It would be nice to be able to have the ability to copy automation formula’s from one board to another and/or be able to flag an option on whether or not we want to copy automations when we use the “Copy Board” function. Thoughts?
